name: Holiday Highland Dressing
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Quaker Oats, uncooked (quick or old-fashioned)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place oats and bread cubes in a large bowl.
2. Combine the remaining ingredients in a separate bowl.
3. Add the combined ingredients to the oats mixture; toss gently to mix.
4. Stuff the dressing lightly into the body cavity and neck region of a turkey.
5. Roast according to standard roasting directions for a 10-12 lb turkey.
